notes.description: When a task has an archived counterpart, read the archive's reference implementation BEFORE writing new code — not after the first bug
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: Archive-first read when porting

notes.description: Any shell command where a large value goes into argv (curl -d, jq --argjson, python -c, etc.) will fail with \"Argument list too long\" above ~128 KB; use tempfile or stdin
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: ARG_MAX — large strings in argv are unsafe above ~128 KB

notes.description: atlas.sum is regenerated during Docker image build; stale atlas.sum in git doesn't break migrations
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: atlas.sum is auto-regenerated — don't flag it

notes.description: When auditing a production filter/classifier, the audit verdict definition MUST mirror that component's own definition — not a broader \"is it bad\" notion.
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: Audit must mirror production definition

notes.description: ssdeep hashes at block size 96 (especially httpreq type) match HTTP boilerplate too broadly — set match_threshold=0.85 minimum and prefer DOM hashes
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: Block-size 96 ssdeep httpreq hashes are unreliable

notes.description: Procedural rules for /review-classification — what to check, what to exclude, push conventions
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: Classification review learnings

notes.description: SSDeep cluster brand field is set by LLM suggestion or human override during labeling — never derived from ASN, composition, or any other data column
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: Cluster brand is human/LLM assigned, not derived from columns

notes.description: When filter-service fails to start in a fresh local stack with \"Initial refresh failed; starting with empty set: unzip: context deadline exceeded\", point TRANCO_LIST_URL at a fast-fail address so FX OnStart returns before its deadline.
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: filter-service Tranco bypass for local-stack startup

notes.description: How to iterate LLM classifier/judge prompts in this codebase — concept-first framing, trace-justified disambiguators, variance characterization before comparing versions
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: LLM prompt iteration methodology

notes.description: Detection-platform governing principle — use LLMs only for content understanding, multimodal reasoning, novel-pattern detection; move lookup tables, string matching, and policy matrices to code even when they currently live in a prompt
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: LLM workflows add intelligence, not execute lookup tables

notes.description: For deep investigations/reviews, update notes.md and a dedicated investigation doc AS you read files — don't let findings live only in conversation context
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: Log investigations incrementally, not at the end

notes.description: Never override the git commit author/committer identity. Use the repository or user git config as-is. No --author flag, no GIT_AUTHOR/COMMITTER_* env vars, no `git -c user.email=...`.
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: Never override git commit identity

notes.description: Non-client malicious ssdeep clusters cause false positives and can't route to gatekeeper — only promote clusters where brand matches an active client domain
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: Only promote ssdeep clusters with client domain brands

notes.description: Playwright MCP must be configured with --headless flag for headless Chrome in Docker containers without X server
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: Playwright MCP must run headless

notes.description: When asked to plan/propose something, save the document — do NOT enter implementation mode or try to implement it
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: Proposals are not implementation tasks

notes.description: In phishfort/detection-platform-metal the default base for PRs is `main`. Pass `--base main` explicitly to avoid legacy defaults leaking in from gh config or past sessions.
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: PRs target main in detection-platform-metal

notes.description: When a task could plausibly be defined by an existing script or code path, find and read it before asking the user clarifying questions.
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: Read canonical scripts and code before asking scope questions

notes.description: Selective refresh endpoints on classifier-worker don't send Redis PubSub notifications — classifier services keep stale in-memory cache until restarted or background cycle runs
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: SSDeep classifier refresh requires service restart

notes.description: e.key returns the shifted character (Shift+. = \">\"), breaking shortcut detection. e.code returns the physical key. Playwright bypasses this.
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: Use e.code not e.key for keyboard shortcuts with modifiers

notes.description: Never claim how code works, what data shows, or how systems behave without verifying. Read the code, query the data, check the state — then assert. Sub-agent reports are inputs, not facts.
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: Verify before asserting — no inference as fact

notes.description: Historical pointer — /workspace was virtiofs with an fd-limit ENFILE issue until 2026-04-24, now ext4 block-device. No active rule.
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: virtiofs ENFILE — historical (superseded 2026-04-24)

notes.description: Always create busy/<task>/ directory BEFORE generating any work artifacts - never dump files in workspace root or detection-platform-work root
notes.re_verify_when: Before promoting to AGENTS.md, shared skills, or operational automation.
notes.title: Workspace hygiene enforcement

notes.description: Ground-truth labeled dataset for impersonation_check seam evaluation — 50 impersonation + 20 non-impersonation cases across 14+ brands
notes.re_verify_when: Before relying on this project fact for code, data, or environment behavior, verify against current workspace state.
notes.title: Curated 70-sample impersonation dataset

notes.description: Repo-agnostic principles for LLM classifier ground truth — corpus is authoritative, clientId is not an LLM input, tainted-template handling, social corpus matching rules.
notes.re_verify_when: Before relying on this project fact for code, data, or environment behavior, verify against current workspace state.
notes.title: LLM classifier ground truth principles

notes.description: Metal has its own staging and prod environments; legacy non-metal staging/prod are still active in parallel. Distinguish via /workspace/classifiers.pipeline-*.env files.
notes.re_verify_when: Before relying on this project fact for code, data, or environment behavior, verify against current workspace state.
notes.title: Metal staging/prod exist alongside still-active legacy GKE

notes.description: Monitor judgement is reserved for brand-confusable hostnames currently showing no content; content-bearing non-impersonation pages do NOT belong in monitor
notes.re_verify_when: Before relying on this project fact for code, data, or environment behavior, verify against current workspace state.
notes.title: Monitor lifecycle scope

notes.description: Multi-signal pattern recognition framework on metal — umbrella concept, per-signal slicing, where curated-library matching belongs vs single-incident classifiers
notes.re_verify_when: Before relying on this project fact for code, data, or environment behavior, verify against current workspace state.
notes.title: Pattern recognition framework

notes.re_verify_when: After workspace-control repo first implementation slice or Pi pilot changes
notes.title: Workspace organization and efficiency review
